error_signature: always getting the same element from the collection
title: Dynamic page/popup returns the same element
symptom: When trying to display filtered values from a dynamic collection, the same element is returned regardless of variable changes. This occurs even after following the tutorial steps.
not_this_if: The filtering works correctly in other instances
root_cause: The issue arises because the filtering is not applied at the moment of the click. Without a proper fetch operation, the previously cached or default data is returned instead of the newly filtered data.
fix_steps: Add a 'Fetch collection' step at the end of your workflow
Ensure that the workflow is saved and re-run it
agent_instruction: Add a 'Fetch collection' step to your workflow to ensure the latest filtered data is retrieved.
